LANGUAGE_SELECT.prompt: Ration Saathi mein tharo swagat hai. Hindi vaste 1 dabao. Rajasthani vaste 2 dabao. CSC sahayak vaste 0 dabao.
LANGUAGE_SELECT.timeout: Koi jawab koni milyo. Kripya 1 ya 2 dabao.

RATION_CARD_INPUT.prompt: Tharo ration card number dabao, pache star dabao.
RATION_CARD_INPUT.timeout: Card number koni milyo. Pacho koshish karo.
RATION_CARD_INPUT.invalid: Galat number. Khali angrezi ra number dabao.

ENTITLEMENT_READ.prompt_template: Ram Ram {head_name} ji. Ee mahine {month} mein, thane {wheat_kg} kilo gehu aur {rice_kg} kilo chawal milno chaiye. Kai thane pooro anaaj milyo? Haan vaste 1, kam milyo toh 2 dabao.

COMPLAINT_TYPE.prompt: Kaini cheez kam mili? Gehu vaste 1, chawal vaste 2, dono vaste 3 dabao.

QUANTITY_INPUT.prompt_template: Thane {expected_kg} kilo milno chaiye ho. Kitto milyo? Kilo mein number dabao pache star.

CASE_CREATED.prompt_template: Thari fariyaad darj ho gayi. Case number hai {case_number}. O number thare pas rakhjo. SMS bhi aasi. Dhanyavaad.

CARD_NOT_FOUND.prompt: O card number mhare system mein koni milyo. CSC kendra par jao ya 0 dabao sahayak vaste.

ASSISTED_REDIRECT.prompt: Thane mhare CSC sahayak su milawa la. Kripya {csc_phone} par call karo ya nearest CSC kendra par jao.

CALL_COMPLETED.prompt: Ration Saathi mein call karan vaste dhanyavaad. Jai Hind.
